name: away_with_active_natvent_transition
description: Warm day: nat-vent running at home (fan on, window open). User leaves (occupancy_away) at 15:00. In production, the away transition deactivates nat-vent and applies away setback. The simulator _handle_occupancy_away() applies setback but does NOT deactivate natural_vent_active state — nat-vent exit is simulator_support:false.
notes: Production behavior: handle_occupancy_away() calls _deactivate_natural_ventilation() if nat-vent is active,
then applies setback. The simulator _handle_occupancy_away() does not check natural_vent_active.
So in the simulator, natural_vent_active state persists after the away transition (incorrect).
The setback_applied assertion IS logic-track (simulator correctly applies setback on away).
The nat-vent exit assertion is simulator_support:false.
Covers Priority 6b away_natvent_transition from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Warm-day classification at home — cool mode, comfort_cool=74F
Window opens: outdoor=65F < indoor=73.5F, indoor > comfort_heat=70F — nat-vent activates
User leaves while nat-vent is active. Production: deactivate nat-vent, apply away setback (79F).

assertions.reason: sensor_open: outdoor=65F < indoor=73.5F, indoor > comfort_heat=70F, threshold=74+3=77F → nat-vent activates
occupancy_away while nat-vent active — production deactivates nat-vent before applying setback
assertions.gap: Simulator _handle_occupancy_away() does not deactivate natural_vent_active. Production handle_occupancy_away() calls _deactivate_natural_ventilation() first.

assertions.reason: Away setback applied after nat-vent deactivation: setback_cool=79F on warm/cool day

verdict.summary: Away transition deactivates nat-vent then applies setback (production); simulator skips nat-vent exit
verdict.observed_behavior: production: natural_ventilation → nat_vent_exit on away → setback_applied (79F)
verdict.expected_behavior: Leaving home while nat-vent is active: nat-vent deactivated, fan stopped, away setback applied
